title: Water Boiling Time
description: Estimate boiling time from water volume, temperatures, and heating power.
helper: Efficiency accounts for heat loss. Use a typical range of 70–90%.

tips.power: Use the rated wattage of your kettle or induction cooker.
tips.loss: Actual time varies with lid, airflow, and ambient temperature.

result.title: Result
result.none: Fill in the inputs to see results.
